poll.question: Marcus spoke his cliff fear and chose to stay. Tomorrow, should the group organize paired work to keep him close, trust his choice and give him space, or ask him what he

options.label: Keep him close
options.desc: Pair off work — fishing, shelter — so Marcus is never alone. Support through structure

options.label: Trust his choice
options.desc: He chose to stay. Let him move freely — his commitment should hold on its own

options.label: Ask him directly
options.desc: Bring it up at fire — what kind of support does Marcus actually need tomorrow?

in_play.label: Jade's truth
in_play.desc: She mirrors him: 'Can this actually last? Will you stay when it gets harder?'
